public void testIsMetaphoneEqualSusan_test0_decomposed()  {
        this.assertIsMetaphoneEqual(
                "Susan",
                new String[] {
                    "Siusan",
                    "Sosanna",
                    "Susan",
                    "Susana",
                    "Susann",
                    "Susanna",
                    "Susannah",
                    "Susanne",
                    "Suzann",
                    "Suzanna",
                    "Suzanne",
                    "Zuzana"
                });
    }
